acceptance_criteria: The recursive playbook defines the common loop, stage outputs, recursion rules, and verification gates.
Each role procedure maps to a specific stage artifact and handoff.

open_questions.question: Prompt procedures remain documentation in this first pass rather than runtime agent manifests.

objective: Validate the playbook and procedure docs.
checks_run: cargo run -p process-method -- validate --repo-root . --work-items-root work-items --changed-path docs/process/recursive-chatgpt-engineering.md --changed-path agents/procedures/strategist.md --changed-path agents/README.md
passed_checks: Procedure docs match the validator stage model.
Changed documentation paths are covered by the work item.

notes: Every procedure names explicit outputs and stop conditions.
Agent guidance now documents validation expectations and handoff structure.
